narrative:
Put- In- Bay Twp township has 682 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.3 percentage points.
